description: Your SOC team is shifting to behavioral analytics to detect insider threats and compromised accounts. Using Splunk (http://localhost:8000, admin/SplunkAdmin1!), create a dashboard named 'Insider_Threat_Analytics' in the Search & Reporting app featuring a global Time Picker linked to two panels. The 'Concurrent IP Usage' panel must identify users in the 'security_logs' index with successful authentications ('Accepted password') from 2 or more distinct source IPs within any 15-minute interval. The 'Off-Hours Access' panel must display successful authentications from the 'security_logs' index occurring between 00:00 and 04:59 local time (hours 0 through 4).
